title: Participate in laboratory or field workplace safety
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Participate in laboratory or field workplace safety demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria.

elements.title: Identify, control and report WHS and environmental hazards

pcs.text: Routinely check immediate work area for hazards prior to commencing and during work
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Routinely check immediate work area for hazards prior to commencing and during work?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Routinely check immediate work area for hazards prior to commencing and during work.

pcs.text: Address hazards within area of responsibility
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Address hazards within area of responsibility?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Address hazards within area of responsibility.

pcs.text: Report hazards and incidents to designated personnel according to workplace policies and procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report hazards and incidents to designated personnel according to workplace policies and procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report hazards and incidents to designated personnel according to workplace policies and procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Identify, control and report WHS and environmental hazards

elements.title: Conduct work safely

pcs.text: Select, fit and use appropriate personal protective equipment (PPE)
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, fit and use appropriate personal protective equipment (PPE)?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit and use appropriate personal protective equipment (PPE).

pcs.text: Follow workplace procedures when carrying out work tasks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Follow workplace procedures when carrying out work tasks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Follow workplace procedures when carrying out work tasks.

pcs.text: Keep all work areas clean and free from obstacles
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Keep all work areas clean and free from obstacles?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Keep all work areas clean and free from obstacles.

pcs.text: Maintain workplace standards of personal hygiene
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain workplace standards of personal hygiene?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain workplace standards of personal hygiene.

pcs.text: Safely store, transport and dispose of hazardous materials and dangerous goods
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Safely store, transport and dispose of hazardous materials and dangerous goods?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Safely store, transport and dispose of hazardous materials and dangerous goods.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Conduct work safely

elements.title: Follow incident and emergency response procedures

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify incident and emergency situations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify incident and emergency situations.

pcs.text: Report and record incident and emergency situations according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report and record incident and emergency situations according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report and record incident and emergency situations according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Follow incident and emergency procedures as appropriate to the nature of emergency using emergency equipment according to workplace procedures

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Follow incident and emergency procedures as appropriate to the nature of emergency using emergency equipment according to workplace procedures.
